prompt: A computer graphics rendering illustrating a depth map. Utilize the composition and shallow depth of field effect from image 1, applied to a subject like the woman from image 2, showing relative distance as grayscale values.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics rendering illustrating a depth map. The central subject should be a woman resembling the individual in image 2, depicted with the close-up, profile composition and pronounced shallow depth of field effect observed in image 1. The depth map must represent relative distances using a grayscale gradient, with closer elements appearing brighter (white) and farther elements appearing darker (black).
